title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at MakeMyTrip Hotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at MakeMyTrip Hotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, MakeMyTrip Hotels in Jabalpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About MakeMyTrip Hotels:
MakeMyTrip Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MakeMyTrip Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
